creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
somebody on IRC ran your photo thru OCR:

Starting sshd.
Starting cron.
Configuring vt: blanktime.
Starting sddm.
Starting background file system checks in 60 seconds.
Tue May 23 21: 11: 45 NDT 2023
FreeBSD/amd64 (river) (ttyve)
login: panic: _cv_timedwait_st: not TDS_RUNNING
couid = B
time = 1684885306
KDB: stack backtrace:
b_trace_self_urapper at db_trace_self_wrapper+8x2b/frame BxfffffeB165b5a7d8
panic() at vpanic+0×150/frame Oxfffffe01655a820 panic() at panic+0x43/frame Oxfffffe016565a880
cv_timedwait_sbtO) at _cv_timedwait_st+8x27c/frame Oxfffffe016565a900
zio_waitO) at zio_wait+Bx3e9/frame BxfffffeB165b5a960
dmu_buf_hold_arrau_bu_dnode() at dmu_buf_hold_array_by_dnode+Bx2fb/frame exfffffe8165b5aa18
dmu_buf_hold_array() at dmu_buf_hold_array+@x4e/frame Oxfffffe0165b5aa60 dmu_read_pages() at dmu_read_pages+0x8a/frame Oxfffffe016565ab00 zfs_freebsd_getpages() at zfs_freebsd_getpages+8×27a/frame Oxfffffe0165b5abbe
vode_pager_getpages() at vnode_pager_getpages+8×37/frame Oxfffffe0165b5ab f0
vm_pager_get_pages() at vm_pager_get_pages+0x5f/frame Oxfffffe0165b5ac40 m_faultO at vm_fault+0x6f6/frame Oxfffffe0165b5ad70 vm_fault_trap() at vm_fault_trap+@×71/frame Oxfffffe01655adba
trap_pfaultO at trap_pfault+0x22c/frame Oxfffffe0165b5a10

--- trap Oxc, rip = B×842b3c29b, rsp = 0x820a3deff, rbp = 0×820a3df10
KDB: enter: panic
[ thread pid 22993 tid 100981 J
Stopped at
kdb_enter+Bx32; movg $0,0xde2b33(%rip)
db>

I'm inclined to agree with manu@ and move this to base
